ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season during which the tournament was held */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "location" TEXT /* Primary location where the tournament is held */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Total number of teams participating in the tournament */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the tournament (e.g., Upcoming, Ongoing, Completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tournament the team is participating in */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group or division the team belongs to */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the current coach */,
  "home_stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team's home stadium */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tournament the match belongs to */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team participating in the match */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team participating in the match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "team1_score" INTEGER /* Score of the first team */,
  "team2_score" INTEGER /* Score of the second team */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stadium where the match was played */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee who officiated the match */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the match */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match (e.g., Sunny, Rainy, Snowy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standing */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tournament the standing belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the team in the standings */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the team */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of draws by the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses by the team */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Total goals against the team */,
  "goal_difference" INTEGER /* Goal difference of the team */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the team */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Number of matches where the team did not concede any goals */,
  "goals_conceded" INTEGER /* Total number of goals conceded by the team */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Total number of yellow cards received by the team */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Total number of red cards received by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_standings_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., Forward, Midfielder, Defender) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "foot" TEXT /* Dominant foot of the player (e.g., Left, Right) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tournament the statistic belongs to */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Total number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Total number of red cards received by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total number of minutes played by the player */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Total number of shots on target by the player */,
  "pass_accuracy" REAL /* Pass accuracy percentage of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tournament the group belongs to */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the group */,
  "stage" TEXT /* Stage of the tournament where the group is located (e.g., Group Stage, Knockout Stage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_groups_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stadiums" (
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stadium */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stadium */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the stadium */,
  "built_year" INTEGER /* Year the stadium was built */,
  "grass_type" TEXT /* Type of grass used on the pitch (e.g., Natural, Artificial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stadium_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match detail */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stadium where the match was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the match */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee who officiated the match */,
  "assistant_referee1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first assistant referee */,
  "assistant_referee2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second assistant referee */,
  "fourth_official_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fourth official */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match (e.g., Sunny, Rainy, Snowy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_details_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_details_stadium_id FOREIGN KEY ("stadium_id") REFERENCES stadiums ("stadium_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position (e.g., Forward, Midfielder, Defender) */,
  "primary_position" TEXT /* Primary position of the player */,
  "secondary_position" TEXT /* Secondary position of the player (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_positions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date when the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., muscle strain, broken bone) */,
  "recovery_date" TEXT /* Expected recovery date of the player */,
  "injured_part" TEXT /* Part of the body that is injured (e.g., Knee, Ankle) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
